# MMS — Market Management System

> A premium market operations console for vendors, managers, officials, and administrators. Streamlines stall allocation, billing, complaints, revenue analytics, announcements, and coordination across market stakeholders.

The application is built with React 18, TypeScript, Vite 7, Tailwind CSS 3, shadcn/ui (Radix primitives), TanStack React Query, react-router-dom v6, framer-motion, recharts, i18next, and Supabase. The frontend is deployed on Vercel; the API server runs on Render with PostgreSQL.

## Public pages

- [Landing page (index)](https://mms-1.vercel.app/): Marketing page with hero, features, process, testimonials, pricing, FAQs, and CTA
- [Login](https://mms-1.vercel.app/login): Phone/password authentication with optional MFA flow
- [Register](https://mms-1.vercel.app/register): Multi-step vendor registration with document upload and OTP verification

## Architecture

- [Source code](https://github.com/vunni-brian/MMS-1): Full monorepo with `src/` (React frontend) and `server/` (Node.js API)
- [API documentation](https://github.com/vunni-brian/MMS-1/blob/master/openapi.yaml): OpenAPI 3.0 specification for all server endpoints
- [Architecture diagram](https://github.com/vunni-brian/MMS-1/blob/master/ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md): System architecture overview

## Frontend routes

- `/` — Landing / marketing page
- `/login` — Sign in
- `/register` — Vendor registration
- `/forgot-password` — Password reset
- `/payments/callback` — Payment gateway callback
- `/vendor/*` — Vendor dashboard, stalls, payments, complaints, billing, reports, audit, coordination, announcements, settings
- `/manager/*` — Manager dashboard, vendors, stalls, payments, complaints, billing, reports, audit, coordination, announcements, settings
- `/official/*` — Official dashboard, markets, vendors, compliance, analytics, billing, reports, audit, coordination, announcements, settings
- `/admin/*` — Admin dashboard, users, markets, alerts, integrations, billing, reports, audit, coordination, announcements, settings

## Key dependencies

- **react 18**, react-dom, react-router-dom 6
- **@tanstack/react-query** — server state management
- **tailwindcss 3**, tailwindcss-animate, @tailwindcss/typography
- **@radix-ui/*** — accessible UI primitives (dialog, dropdown, select, tabs, tooltip, etc.)
- **framer-motion** — animations
- **recharts** — charts and analytics
- **i18next**, react-i18next — internationalization (en, lg, sw)
- **lucide-react** — icons
- **zod** — validation
- **react-hook-form** — form management
- **sonner** — toast notifications
- **date-fns** — date utilities
- **@supabase/supabase-js** — Supabase client
- **react-helmet-async** — per-page head/meta management
- **lottie-react** — animation player

## Backend (server/)

- Node.js with TypeScript (strip types)
- PostgreSQL via Supabase
- Session-based auth with OTP
- PesaPal payment integration
- SMS notifications
- Rate limiting, audit logging, penalty management

## Optional

- [FastHTML llms.txt example](https://www.fastht.ml/docs/llms.txt): Reference for the llms.txt format used here
- [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org/): The llms.txt specification
